_note: Evolving per-NPC relationship state. Orchestrator updates after each significant NPC interaction. DM reads this before any scene involving NPCs. Attitude scale: unknown / neutral / cautious / friendly / hostile.

npc_01.name: Brother Edwyn
npc_01.notes: Injured and hiding in the preparation chamber (r04). No party contact yet. Likely to be frightened on first contact; will warm quickly if the party seems capable.

npc_02.name: Sera Dobb
npc_02.notes: Somewhere in the looted vault (r06), searching through grave goods. No party contact yet. Will lie about her name and deny involvement with the broken ward. Has the chalk-marked satchel.

npc_03.name: Vrath
npc_03.notes: The warlord's wight, waiting in r08. Does not parley. Attitude is fixed — treat as encounter, not conversation.
